name: founding_premise_split_path
description: Founding premise (world_prompt) differs from T1 action. Verifies the full scenario_notes pipeline: raw_input override, canonical_name extraction, player-linked facts in scenario_notes, atmospheric sentence in world_notes (reserved-not-promoted invariant). T2 verifies TRUTH block contains both canonical identity AND at least one promoted scenario note — not just identity.
world_prompt: I wake up inside a small cottage in Crestfall. My name is Eleanor Voss. My husband Daniel is away at sea for the next three weeks. Right now I am at my desk writing him a letter. The harbor town of Crestfall is known for its fishermen and the heavy fogs that roll in each winter.
